function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T10:00:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Linked invoices (oldest 4)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest four invoices linked to your design partner.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final; to complete verification and evidence quality, I need to read the three attached invoice files that were selected via search snippets.
next_step.observation: Outbound draft file was written successfully to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T10-00-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Read inv_0001 confirms linkage and date. Continue verifying remaining selected invoices read explicitly.
next_step.observation: INV-0001 shows issued_on 2025-10-06 and related_entity Nina Schreiber.

next_step.current_state: Read inv_0002 verified. Need inv_0003 read for full grounding before completion.
next_step.observation: INV-0002 confirms issued_on 2025-11-03 and same related_entity Nina Schreiber.

next_step.current_state: All selected attachment files have now been read directly; inbox item was read earlier so deletion criteria is satisfied.
next_step.observation: Read INV-0003 confirming issued_on 2025-12-01 and related_entity Nina Schreiber.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was to handle next inbox item. I processed lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, verified sender against canonical entity (miles.md), resolved invoice linkage via related_entity Nina Schreiber, identified linked set of 5 invoices and selected oldest 4 by issued_on (2025-10-06, 2025-11-03, 2025-12-01, 2026-01-17). Outbox rule requires attachments newest-first, so attachment order in draft is 2026-01-17, 2025-12-01, 2025-11-03, 2025-10-06. Wrote outbound draft and deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested outbound draft.

function.message:
Handled the next inbox item by preparing a reply draft with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Miles’s design partner and then removing the processed inbox file.

Created: 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T10-00-00Z.md
Recipient: miles@novak.example
Attachments included (oldest-4 set, ordered newest-first per outbox rule):
1) 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
2) 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
3) 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
4) 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, root AGENTS, context), read inbox/email and sending workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email requested 'oldest 4 invoices linked to my design partner'. Canonical linkage evidence in invoice records uses related_entity 'Nina Schreiber'; search returned 5 linked invoices (inv_0001..inv_0005). Oldest 4 by issued_on are inv_0001, inv_0002, inv_0003, inv_0004. Outbox attachment-order rule required newest-first ordering within included set. Outbound draft was created and inbox item removed per inbox-processing workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read invoice files inv_0001 inv_0002 inv_0003 inv_0004
